changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE question_answers_to_vendors ( id serial, question_id integer NOT NULL, answer_id integer NOT NULL, vendor_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_question_answers_to_vendors PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_question_answers_to_vendors_to_question FOREIGN KEY (question_id) REFERENCES qualitative_questions (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_question_answers_to_vendors_to_answer FOREIGN KEY (answer_id) REFERENCES qualitative_question_answers (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_question_answers_to_vendors_to_vendor FOREIGN KEY (vendor_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_question_answers_to_vendors_question ON question_answers_to_vendors (question_id); CREATE INDEX i_question_answers_to_vendors_answer ON question_answers_to_vendors (answer_id); CREATE INDEX i_question_answers_to_vendors_vendor ON question_answers_to_vendors (vendor_id);
